title: Telangana High Court grants one week's transit anticipatory bail to Pawan Khera in Assam Police FIR
description: The Telangana High Court on Friday granted transit anticipatory bail for one week to Congress leader Pawan Khera in a case of forgery and criminal conspiracy registered against him by Assam Police.Justice K Sujana, who heard Khera's plea on Thursday, passed the order on Friday granting Khera relief for one week within which time he can move a regular anticipatory bail plea before the concerned court having jurisdiction.Khera is a resident of Delhi and the case against him has been registered in
